notes.note: A natural language name identifying the structure definition. This name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation.
A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the structure definition.
The name of the organization or individual responsible for the release and ongoing maintenance of the structure definition.
The name of an individual to contact.
A name for the specification that is being mapped to.
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Extensão para as informações relacionadas aos dados da pesquisa clínica registrada na ANVISA.
trans-unit.target: Extensão para as informações relacionadas aos dados da pesquisa clínica registrada na ANVISA.

notes.note: A single preferred label which is the text to display beside the element indicating its meaning or to use to prompt for the element in a user display or form.
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Número do protocolo do estudo clínico na Anvisa.
trans-unit.target: Número do protocolo do estudo clínico na Anvisa.

notes.note: A single preferred label which is the text to display beside the element indicating its meaning or to use to prompt for the element in a user display or form.
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. trans-unit.source: Número da versão do protocolo do estudo na Anvisa.
trans-unit.target: Número da versão do protocolo do estudo na Anvisa.

notes.note: A single preferred label which is the text to display beside the element indicating its meaning or to use to prompt for the element in a user display or form.
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. trans-unit.source: Número do registro sanitário da vacina na Anvisa, seja este registro emergencial ou definitivo.
trans-unit.target: Número do registro sanitário da vacina na Anvisa, seja este registro emergencial ou definitivo.
